memoryArtifacts.headline: Hedingham Castle, Essex, England
memoryArtifacts.description:
• 4 May 2016
Hedingham Castle, in the village of Castle Hedingham, Braintree District, Essex, England, is a Norman motte-and-bailey castle with a stone keep. For four centuries it was the primary seat of the de Vere family, Earls of Oxford.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana de Vere於大約1116年11月1日出生在英國諾福爾可登哈姆時，她的父親Aubrey II de Vere52歲，母親Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare22歲。她於大約1143年與Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1194年12月26日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可福藍普林加姆享年78歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可特福德特福德 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana de Vere was born about 1 November 1116, in Hedenham, Norfolk, England, her father, Aubrey II de Vere, was 52 and her mother, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, was 22. She married Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk about 1143. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 26 December 1194, in Wramplingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana de Vere est née environ 1 novembre 1116, à Hedenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Aubrey II de Vere, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk environ 1143. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 26 décembre 1194, à Wramplingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana de Vere um 1. November 1116 in Hedenham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aubrey II de Vere 52 und ihre Mutter Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare 22. Sie hat um 1143 Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 26. Dezember 1194 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Wramplingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana de Vereが約1116年11月1日にイギリスノーフォルクヘデンハムで生まれた時，父Aubrey II de Vereは52歳，母Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clareは22歳であった。約1143年にHugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1194年12月26日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウランプリンガムで78歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードスエトフォード プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana de Vere(이)가 대략 1116년 11월 1일 영국 노르폴크 헤데함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aubrey II de Vere(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1143년 Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1194년 12월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 램플링함에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 테트퍼드 테트퍼드 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Vere nasceu aproximadamente 1 de novembro de 1116, em Hedenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Aubrey II de Vere, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk aproximadamente 1143. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana de Vere родилась около 1 ноября 1116 г. в местности хеденам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Aubrey II de Vere было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk около 1143 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 26 декабря 1194 г. в местности рамплингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности тетфорд приори, тетфорд, норфолк, Англия.
